calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-03-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Tolstunov Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Sets One And Statement Of Damages
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-NOV-14-2018:
Peter F. Finn, Esq. of Bradley Curley, Barrabee & Kowalski, PC (T: 415.464.8888) appearing via telephonically on behalf of Defendant / Moving Parting.
No other appearances.

Defendant Tolstunov's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Sets One And Statement Of Damages is Granted. Motion is unopposed. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk: L. Fong; Proceedings not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-30-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
